## [00:00 - 03:02]

Hey, what's up everybody? It's your boy Tanner Smith. I'm excited to be here and show you exactly how to integrate your Meta Business Ads Manager and all of the KPIs and metrics for your ads here into the Business Hub so that you can from one consolidated place organize and run everything that you need to. Now why this is important, why this is valuable is because as an advertiser, as a business owner, you're going to probably have lots of different things open, lots of different tools, lots of different technological components. And it's really great and easy to consolidate all those things into one place. It's easy to streamline and you can track, report and keep everything organized. So that being said, let's dive right into it. All right, so the first thing that you want to do is actually log into the Mastermind Business Hub. Once you are logged in, I'm going to move my ugly mug out of the way, you can see down at the very bottom on the left side of the screen, left hand column, there's a settings button. I want you to click on the settings. And then once you do, you're going to see a series of other options pop up and become available to you. I want you to click on integrations and then you're going to see you've got Google, Facebook, Instagram, QuickBooks, Stripe, Shopify, a bunch of other resources to connect here. In order to connect your Meta Business Manager account, you need to go to the Facebook and Instagram one and hit connect. Now once you do that, it's going to open up this page right here where you're going to have to select the Facebook page that you want to link this location. Now I would recommend before you actually go to connect that you are logged into your Facebook account because if you're not logged into your Facebook account, it will prompt you to log in and it adds a little bit more complexity. It's just a lot easier that if you're logged into your Facebook account, then you hit connect, you'll be good to go. Then you want to select the Facebook account here. I've got a lot of ones I'm currently on right now. Just go select syndicate marketing, hit connect page. What we're going to do now is once you connect page, it's already logged in. It's going to give the Mastermind Business Hub access and ability to leverage and use this data. You now need to select your ad account. You're going to come here and select ad account and then you're going to select the ad account that you want to give access to. Once you do that, you're going to see here that it's going to say connected. Now access all of the data from that ad account or from your meta business manager ad account and view it here in the business hub. What you're going to do is go back to the main page. So hit that go back button there and at the very bottom, you're going to see something that says reporting. If you click on reporting, you're going to see that you've got Google ads up the top. If you connect your Google ad account, Facebook ads, if you click on Facebook ads, now you're going to see here all of the data from that specific ad account. This is fantastic because once again, you can keep everything consolidated in one place from a reporting perspective. You don't have to be logged into Google, into meta and into all these other places to actually see and view how your business is doing. You can actually manage all of the tracking and all of the reporting from one single place.

## [03:02 - 03:09]

There's another reason why I love the Mastermind Business Hub and why I highly recommend that you do this so you can know exactly where your business is at at all times.
